CALL_SECTION_TEXT: Had a late night and need to get home? Place an order with us. We'll take you home in your own car!
FOOTER_ABOUT_TITLE: Pro Drink and Drive - About us
FOOTER_ABOUT_TEXT: We have set ourselves the goal of making the city and its roads safer for ourselves, for our loved ones, for the people we love and who love us! We do not tolerate drunk driving! For us this is not just a job, but a mission!
OUR_DRIVERS_DESCRIPTION: Our drivers are experienced and professional. They are trained to drive safely and responsibly. We work 24/7 to get you to your destination quickly and stress-free.
OUR_DRIVERS_WE_UNDERSTAND: We understand how important it is to be safe on the road - that's why we always use safe routes and maintain our vehicles in excellent condition.
